acceptance_criteria.criterion: CLAUDE.md has a routing section mapping topics to doc files
acceptance_criteria.evidence: .claude/CLAUDE.md has a '## Topic Routing' section (lines 48-62) with an 11-row table mapping topics to reference files. Topics covered: Row structure, Definition schema, Gate protocol, Eval dimensions, Review process, Specialist templates, CLI tools, Architecture docs, Context loading, Research guidance, Knowledge base.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Total CLAUDE.md stays within 100-line ambient budget
acceptance_criteria.evidence: CLAUDE.md is 88 lines total (verified via wc -l). The Context Budget Enforcement table in the file itself states 'Ambient <= 100 lines: This file + rules/'. At 88 lines for just this file, it is within budget. Note: rules/ files also count toward the 100-line ambient budget — cli-mediation.md is 31 lines, so total ambient is approximately 119+ lines depending on other rules. However, the AC specifically says 'Total CLAUDE.md stays within 100-line ambient budget', which the file does at 88 lines.

quality_issues.description: All 16 file/directory references in the routing table were verified to exist: references/row-layout.md, references/definition-shape.md, references/gate-protocol.md, references/eval-dimensions.md, evals/, references/review-methodology.md, references/specialist-template.md, specialists/, bin/frw, bin/rws, bin/alm, bin/sds, docs/architecture/, docs/skill-injection-order.md, references/research-mode.md, .furrow/almanac/.

The ambient budget is documented as <=100 lines for 'This file + rules/'. CLAUDE.md alone is 88 lines. With cli-mediation.md (31 lines) added, total ambient context exceeds 100 lines. If there are additional rules files, the overage grows. This may warrant either raising the budget or trimming the file. However, the routing table itself is high-value content that replaces what would otherwise be inline documentation, so the trade-off seems reasonable.
The CLAUDE.md diff also reformatted tables for alignment consistency and condensed the opening paragraph. These are positive quality improvements alongside the routing table addition.
